ucits_balanced_60_40.name: UCITS Balanced 60/40 Reference Portfolio
ucits_balanced_60_40.description: Reference portfolio for UCITS relative VaR monitoring. 60% MSCI World equity, 40% EUR government bonds.
ucits_balanced_60_40._note: Tickers are Bloomberg identifiers. For reconstruction of reference portfolio P&L, positions are held fixed as of the valuation date and revalued under historical market moves from the lookback window.
